page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The CPU configuration allocates exactly 1.0 thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the server includes 15,358 GB of bundled SSD storage. The network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are present on this instance type.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of local SSD storage combined with a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance for workloads requiring substantial local data caching and memory capacity. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable compute performance. This hardware profile is configured for large-scale database deployments, storage-intensive applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.16xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The hardware profile includes 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core, alongside a substantial 15,358 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is established at a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps, and the instance does not feature GPU acceleration. This configuration offers a high-density storage and memory profile, making it qualitatively cost-effective for workloads that require large local storage volumes and dedicated compute resources. It is suited for database hosting, data warehousing, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.16xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB of RAM, 15,358 GB of local SSD storage, and 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core server featuring over fifteen terabytes of local SSD storage and half a terabyte of system memory.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores with 1.0 thread per core
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
15,358 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Configured for database hosting and memory-intensive workloads
